privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two Emoncms user accounts: tenant_a with email tenant_a@building.local and tenant_b with email tenant_b@building.local. These usernames and emails are consistently specified across task.json description, README.md Goal section, and verified in the setup and export scripts. The data is entirely synthetic, generated during task execution through Emoncms account creation and API key management rather than from external data sources. All metadata claims match the authoritative task documentation.
